title: The Un-Furnace!
description: A block to Un-Cook your items!
body:
**Welcome to the Un-Furnace!**
The Un-Furnace is a lightweight mod used to convert your smelted items back into their raw counterparts! This _heavily advanced_ block can help with **many irritating issues** such as:
- You wanting your sand from glass
- You wanting to un-smelt your iron to make the **_amazing_** raw iron block
- Other things that you are most likely trying to think of but can't seem to find any.

If you download the mod, I hope this becomes increadibly useful to you.
Have a nice day.
